response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical versatility, leadership in full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure, and experience with scalable systems. While his background aligns well with distributed systems and developer tooling, his direct experimentation platform experience is limited, and his seniority (Staff vs. Principal) may require further assessment for IC6 expectations.
strengths: Proven track record in designing and shipping scalable systems (e.g., Optilyz, Dunnhumby media).
Hands-on leadership in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (re:cinq, GISCollective).
Diverse technical expertise across languages (TypeScript, Dlang, C/C++) and domains (web, embedded, cloud).
concerns: Limited explicit experience with experimentation platforms or statistical analysis for growth systems.
Seniority (Staff Engineer) may not fully align with Principal-level expectations for cross-team architecture.
No clear evidence of building or owning enterprise-scale experimentation frameworks.
